tagline: A sharper, healthier lawn — and a property that stays clean. Mowing, landscaping, and junk hauling from a dependable, locally owned Jonesboro crew.
rating_blurb: Locally owned and operated — Jonesboro & Clayton County's dependable lawn, landscape & hauling crew
services_intro: Recurring lawn care, full-service landscaping, and fast junk hauling for homes and businesses across Jonesboro — one dependable, locally owned crew that leaves your property sharp and spotless.
service_1_desc: Recurring mowing, edging, trimming, and cleanup to keep Jonesboro lawns sharp and healthy season-round.
service_2_desc: Full-service landscaping and yard transformations — planting, mulching, and outdoor upgrades from a dependable local crew.
service_3_desc: Yard debris, brush, and bulk junk hauled away fast so your property stays clean and clutter-free.
about_paragraph: Lyfe Lawn Care is a locally owned lawn, landscape, and hauling company based in Jonesboro, Georgia, serving homeowners and businesses across Clayton County. We handle everything from recurring mowing and maintenance to full-service landscaping and fast junk removal. You talk to the crew that does the work, not a call center — our pricing is straightforward, and our goal is simple: a property you're proud of, sharp, healthy, and clutter-free, without the hassle. Give us a call to set up a free quote.
proof_note: No verified rating or review count available at scrub time; all aggregated/composite review claims removed. Reachable proof: phone (404) 390-9963 and listed address 8140 Tara Blvd, Jonesboro, GA 30236. Confirm any rating/testimonials directly with owner before re-adding.
